name: You're Brain damaged RPG
description:
Welcome to the Asylum, after getting hit by a truck you woke up to find yourself in a fucked up hospital, psycho Nurses with sharp teeth and crazy eyes, hulking, monstrous orderlies ready to tie you down, Lanky gaunt doctors willing to drug you up and start over again. And finally an odd voice in your head known as Conscience. Try to escape? Go postal and gun your way out? Or are you too weak to fight back?

Fucking weeb. Of course the Truck wasn't going to Isakai you! It just broke your fucking skull!

Happy Halloween Everyone!

Type /reality for a surprise (;
creator: Mason8tor
